items.claim: Kai Kamaka has a relatively solid chin.
Luke Riley is fast and athletic.
Luke Riley has good striking and prefers to keep the fight standing.
items.quote: he's a good striker, he does everything to keep a fight in the feet.

items.claim: Luke Riley's takedown defense is only average.
items.quote: Takedown defense just okay. It's not awful. It's not great. It's just okay.

items.claim: Luke Riley demonstrates impressive combinations by working the head and body in the same exchange.
items.quote: combinations are impressive because he'll work the body, he'll work the head, and he'll do it all in the same exchange.

items.claim: Luke Riley is susceptible to being pressured and backed up by gritty opponents.
items.quote: If they get somebody that just kind of gets in their face and backs them up and says, "I don't care about your technique." It [ __ ] them up.

items.claim: Kai Kamaka is not typically a fighter who gets pushed around.
items.quote: Kai Kamaka is typically not a guy that gets pushed around.

items.claim: Luke Riley has been taken down and controlled on the ground in previous fights.
items.quote: we've seen Luke Riley be taken down. We've seen him be controlled on the ground.

items.claim: Kai Kamaka is not a pure wrestler.
items.quote: he's not really like a pure wrestler
